description: Alice delegates scheduling to Bob, who negotiates a kickoff meeting time with Carol. Alice is invited but traveling.

events.title: Data Migration Project Kickoff
events.reasoning: Alice delegates to Bob to schedule a kickoff meeting with Carol for the data migration project. Bob and Carol agree on Monday at 9 AM for 90 minutes in the Maple Room. Bob confirms he will include Alice on the invite.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 1 event: data migration project kickoff on Monday at 9 AM in the Maple Room.

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. Monday=Feb 23. Alice is included on the invite even though she is traveling.
